title: Summer Break in Mallorca: Cala Ratjada & Tramuntana

slots.name: Flight to Palma
slots.description: Direct flight from Berlin (BER) to Palma de Mallorca (PMI) with Ryanair. Flight FR 216.

slots.name: Car Rental Pickup
slots.description: Pick up rental car at Palma Airport. Wiber or Hertz recommended.

slots.name: Hotel Check-in
slots.description: Check-in at Mamboo Hotel Cala Ratjada. Total for 3 nights.

slots.name: Relaxed Morning
slots.description: Relaxed morning at the hotel or a short walk to the local harbor.

slots.name: Hidden Beach Discovery
slots.description: Coastal trek to the secluded coves of Cala Torta and Cala Mesquida. Pristine waters and pine-scented trails.
slots.notes: Bring water and snacks; these beaches are largely undeveloped.

slots.name: Late Lunch
slots.description: Lunch at a local spot near the beach or back in Cala Ratjada.

slots.name: Seafront Lounging
slots.description: Afternoon lounging by the sea at Son Moll beach or the hotel pool.

slots.name: Dinner at Los Arcos
slots.description: Romantic dinner at Los Arcos, known for its quiet terrace and traditional Spanish cuisine.

slots.name: Drive to Tramuntana
slots.description: Drive from Cala Ratjada to the Tramuntana Mountains (Valldemossa/Deià area).

slots.name: Light Hiking in Tramuntana
slots.description: Light hiking on the 'Dry Stone Route' (GR-221) near Valldemossa. Scenic views of olive groves and the sea.
slots.notes: UNESCO World Heritage site. Moderate difficulty.

slots.name: Village Exploration
slots.description: Explore the charming streets of Deià or Valldemossa. Relaxed pace.

slots.name: Lunch at S'Estaca
slots.description: Lunch at Restaurante S'Estaca in Valldemossa. Local food with scenic views.

slots.name: Dinner at CUCUM Beach House
slots.description: Dinner at CUCUM Beach House at Playa Son Moll for a chic, seaside romantic setting.

slots.name: Drive to Airport
slots.description: Drive from Cala Ratjada to Palma Airport. Drop off rental car.
slots.notes: Allow time for car return. Approx. 1h drive.

slots.name: Return Flight
slots.description: Return flight from Palma (PMI) to Berlin (BER).
